metadata.explanation: Implemented a complete cyberpunk CSS theme. Features include: 1) Root CSS variables for neon colors. 2) A scanline overlay using repeating linear gradients to mimic retro CRTs. 3) A 'neural link' glitch text animation using keyframed text-shadow shifts. 4) Themed form inputs with neon glow underlines on focus. 5) A login button using clip-path for an angular futuristic shape, including a hover glitch animation. 6) Error handling styles with a red pulse effect to signify security alerts.
